items.claim: The two heavyweight fighters in this matchup have poor cardio.
items.quote: we got two guys with horrible gas tanks, man.

items.claim: Levi Rodriguez is a superior striker compared to Franco.
items.quote: I just Levi is just better than Franco. I think Franco's awful. Um, he's just a much better striker.

items.claim: Franco's performance drops significantly if he cannot secure an early finish.
items.quote: on the lower regional scene, he can finish quick, but if he can't finish quick, he's a dead man walking.

items.claim: Steuart Nichols has lost three consecutive fights.
items.quote: That's that's three losses in a row.

items.claim: Alvin Hines previously tested positive for multiple performance-enhancing drugs.
items.quote: Hines tests positive for everything under the sun.

items.claim: RJ Harris demonstrates technical proficiency with standing guillotines.
items.quote: he worked the standing guillotine earlier in the fight, just couldn't lock it in, but he went right back to it.
